user_claim: Customer: I received a package that looks water damaged. | Support: Was the item inside wet too? | Customer: I have not opened everything yet, but the outside has a wet-looking stain. | Support: So the claim is about the package condition? | Customer: Yes, the package surface looked damaged when it arrived.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The image clearly shows water stains and damage on the side of the package, which matches the user's claim of water damage to the package surface.
claim_status_justification: img_1 shows clear water stains and damage on the side of the package, which aligns with the user's claim of water damage to the package surface.
